message:
feat: surface DND in gt status and auto-reset muted mode on gt up

Show DND/notification state in `gt status` output (both top-level section
and per-agent badge) so muted agents are immediately visible. Auto-reset
muted DND for the current agent on `gt up` to prevent orchestration stalls
after debug/incident sessions.

Also fixes doctor misclassified-wisps check to use routes.jsonl for rig
path resolution instead of assuming db name == directory name.

Closes #2541

Co-Authored-By: Rohit Bhosle <5801907+ChicK00o@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
